name: /price with unknown ticker shows not recognized message

payload.text: "INVALIDCOIN" is not a recognized ticker. Try a known ticker like BTC, ETH, or SOL.

name: /price without args shows empty watchlist message

payload.text:
Your watchlist is empty.

Use the Add Coin menu or type a ticker to start building your watchlist.

name: /price BTC returns price or unavailable message
